CustomField.description: The execution priority for this resolver relative to other resolvers. Resolvers are chained in ascending order (e.g., 1, then 2, then 3). The first resolver to successfully resolve a class name wins.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The execution priority for this resolver (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Resolvers are chained in ascending order (lowest number first). The first resolver to find a match wins.
CustomField.label: Order
